current.explain: Normal environment. Score 18 — full deployment. Historical pattern indicates low structural risk.

backtest.sell_rule: Pool increases at trigger: Shock→100%, Structural→75%, Grinding→50%
backtest.buy_rule: Staged re-entry 25%→50%→75%→100% after shock cooldown and conditions clear

state_overrides.desc: Full exit. Hard lock 5 trading days.
Exposure cap 25%. Held until MA200 recovery.
Exposure cap 50%. Held until above MA200 ≥5 days.

must: Avoid full reinvestment during structural damage
Protect against leverage decay (TQQQ volatility drag)
Maintain pool discipline across all modes
Apply staged re-entry — no aggressive reinstatement
tone_examples: "Structural lock active. Exposure capped at 25% until MA200 recovery stabilizes."
"Shock cooldown: 5 days hard lock. Re-entry requires price above MA50 and vol normalization."
philosophy.primary_goal: ACCOUNT SURVIVAL — capital preservation first, returns second.
philosophy.disclaimer: VR Survival System is a risk management framework — NOT financial advice. TQQQ is a 3x leveraged ETF with significant volatility decay risk. Past backtest performance does not guarantee future results. This system describes risk environment conditions to guide exposure decisions.
